error.invalid_host: Invalid meter host or IP address.
error.invalid_port: Invalid meter port. Must be between 1 and 65535.
error.invalid_poll_interval: Invalid poll interval. Must be between 5 and 3600 seconds.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to meter. Please verify the host and port.

user.title: IEEE 2030.5 Meter
user.description: Connect to your IEEE 2030.5 compliant meter. Minimum required: meter host/IP.

data.agent_version: Meter agent version (auto, v1, or v3)
data.migrate_existing_addon_paths: Migrate from old MQTT add-on certificate layout

data_description.display_name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant (optional).
data_description.meter_host: IP address or hostname of your IEEE 2030.5 meter.
data_description.meter_port: HTTPS port used by the meter (typically 8081).
data_description.poll_interval: How frequently to poll the meter for updated telemetry.
data_description.mode: Use 'simulator' for testing, 'real' for production meters.
data_description.show_lfdi: Enable to view the certificate LFDI (required for Energy Provider registration).
data_description.migrate_existing_addon_paths: Reuse certificate files from the old Xcel Itron MQTT add-on.

migrate_from_addon.title: Migrate From Xcel Itron MQTT Add-on
migrate_from_addon.description: Specify the certificate file layout from the old MQTT add-on.

data_description.cert_dir: Path to the directory containing certificate files.
data_description.cert_file: Name of the client certificate file (e.g., client.crt).
data_description.key_file: Name of the client key file (e.g., client.key).
data_description.ca_file: Name of the CA certificate file (e.g., ca.crt).

init.title: IEEE 2030.5 Meter Options
init.description: Update meter connection settings and polling configuration.
